tools.name: schemas.fetchSchema
tools.description: Fetch a specific schema with its nested versions.

tools.name: schemas.fetchSchemaVersion
tools.description: Fetch a specific schema and version.

tools.name: schemas.listSchemaVersion
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of versions of the schema.

tools.name: sinks.createSink
tools.description: Create a new Sink

tools.name: sinks.createSinkTest
tools.description: Create a new Sink Test Event for the given Sink.

tools.name: sinks.createSinkValidate
tools.description: Validate that a test event for a Sink was received.

tools.name: sinks.deleteSink
tools.description: Delete a specific Sink.

tools.name: sinks.fetchSink
tools.description: Fetch a specific Sink.

tools.name: sinks.listSink
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Sinks belonging to the account used to make the request.

tools.name: sinks.updateSink
tools.description: Update a specific Sink

tools.name: subscriptions.createSubscribedEvent
tools.description: Create a new Subscribed Event type for the subscription

tools.name: subscriptions.createSubscription
tools.description: Create a new Subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.deleteSubscribedEvent
tools.description: Remove an event type from a subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.deleteSubscription
tools.description: Delete a specific Subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.fetchSubscribedEvent
tools.description: Read an Event for a Subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.fetchSubscription
tools.description: Fetch a specific Subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.listSubscribedEvent
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Subscribed Event types for a Subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.listSubscription
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Subscriptions belonging to the account used to make the request.

tools.name: subscriptions.updateSubscribedEvent
tools.description: Update an Event for a Subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.updateSubscription
tools.description: Update a Subscription.

tools.name: types.fetchEventType
tools.description: Fetch a specific Event Type.

tools.name: types.listEventType
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all the available Event Types.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
